rationale: Educ. Code §29.013 governs noneducational community-based support services grants for students with disabilities. It has no relationship to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The commissioner shall adopt rules establishing procedures and criteria for the allocation of grants under this section to students who are eligible under Subsection (b)
_note: No conflict. The rule concerns special education support services grants and is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
